So it is discouraged to use large amounts or big pieces in the microwave oven otherwise mix the food in between for even heating or cooking. Never use partially heated food. Don't cook frozen food in the microwave oven directly as it leaves some parts of the food partially cooked. Always use glass or pottery dishes and food grade microwave friendly plastic dishes and wrap to re-heat foods. Approximate calorific value of some cooked food preparation are given in annexure 8. /c63
